name: Merchant Onboarding & Fraud Prevention
description: End-to-end merchant lifecycle — from application to fraud-safe live transactions

steps.role: Onboard merchant, verify KYB, provision terminal
Monitor all transactions for fraud in real-time

name: Invoice-to-Cash Automation
description: Automated invoice matching, reconciliation, and GL posting across ERP systems

steps.role: Match invoices to payments, post to GL, flag exceptions

name: Print Customer Retention Pipeline
description: Detect churn signals early and trigger retention + upsell before customers leave

steps.role: Monitor order patterns, score churn risk, send retention emails
Score upsell propensity and route high-value leads to sales

name: SMB Data Enrichment & Scoring
description: Continuously enrich SMB profiles with firmographic and payment signals

steps.role: Enrich profiles, score payment behavior, push to CRM and marketing
